channel.title: introduction on Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content in introduction on Dillon de Silva

item.title: What's the Point of this Blog?
item.description: Where do I start? Have you ever sat in front of a computer with the intention of doing something productive? Your mind focuses as you sit in front of the glowing screen where magic is possible. You relax, take a sip of your coffee, place your hands on the keyboard and… nothing This is me right now. A clueless 15 year old who’s not quite sure why he’s starting a blog just yet.
